svg.title: Self-custody freedom rises with documentation responsibility
svg.desc: An upward diagonal line. As self-custody freedom increases along the horizontal axis, documentation and continuity responsibility increases along the vertical axis. At the low end, a custodian holds the asset and also carries the records and recovery burden. At the high end, full self-custody gives maximum freedom and places the entire records, recovery, and inheritance burden on you. The freedom and the responsibility are the same move seen from two sides.
svg.text: Freedom and responsibility are one move
The more keys you hold, the more of the records and recovery problem is yours alone.
